_synthetic: OBVIOUSLY FAKE per-entity NetSuite M2M connector config for --replay / tests. Mirrors the shape of ../../../templates/connector-config.template.json, adapted for the OAuth2 client-credentials (M2M) auth flow: auth carries a client_id/cert_id/scope (never a secret — the private key stays off this file, resolved by a signer at runtime) instead of a refresh-token env var.

auth._private_key_note: LIVE use only: the private key is a 0600 FILE path (never inline/argv). See netsuite_signer.py.
